title: stenostephanus madrensis
intro: Stenostephanus madrensis is a plant species, also known as "Madre de Cobre," which belongs to the family Acanthaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds. The plant is valued for its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which are believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting oxidative stress, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Stenostephanus madrensis is often used as a tea or infusions, and can also be found in some supplements and traditional remedies.
